titleStmt.title: SII 9.463: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 463. (A.R. No. 372 of 1921.) ON THE EAST WALL OF THE ALANKARAMANDAPA BEFORE THE TRIPURASAMHARA IMAGE IN THE TIRUVIRATTANESVARA TEMPLE AT TIRUVADI, CUDDALORE TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: The inscription is dated Vikṛiti, Āśvīja, śu. 13, Sōmavāra corresponding to A.D. 1470 October 8, Monday, and records the grant of the villages Satyābharaṇanallūr and Suṇṇāūru by Aṇṇamarasayya, an officer of the Sāḷuva Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Narasiṅgayyadēva-Mahā-arasu, for offerings to the god Vīraṭadēva of Tiruvadi during the early morning service and for conducting the car-festival in the month of Tai. The villages are stated to have been situated in Naḍuvimaṇḍalada-vēṇṭhe, a sub-division of Vaḷidilambaṭina-chāvaḍi, granted to Aṇṇamarasayya by the king for amaranāyakatana. It also records the gift of some land to the person supervising the worship.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Every line begins with a circle.vikṛtisaṁvatsarada Āśvīja śu 13 sōlū śrīma(ṁ)nmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvara mēdinīmīsaragaṁḍa kaṭhārisāḷuva sāḷvanarasiṁgayyadēvama
hāarsugaḷa Avasarada Aṁṇamarsarū tiruvadiya vīraṭadēvarige koṭṭa dharmaśāsanada paṭe narasiṁgarājavoḍeyara dharmavāgi nimage na
yivēdyakke Udayakāla nayivēdyakke dina Oṁdakkaṁ Akki Oṁdu kalau mēluvecake voṁdu haṇau yī maryyāde lekhadalū varuṣa 1 kke mūnūṟu Aṟuvatta kala AkkiU mēluvecakke mū
vattaĀṟuhoṁnū tayi māsa cāra nitya māḍisuvaṁtāgi naḍava tirunāḷige yī tirunāḷada tirunāḷavina haṁneraḍuke saluva veca Aṟuvattu hoṁnu U
bhayaṁ veccatoṁbhattu Āru honnū Ā muṁnūra Aṟuvattu kalake sērisi koṭidu na(ṁ)mma Amaranāyakatana vaḷidilaṁbaṭinacāvaḍiya naḍuvimaṁḍalada vēṁṭeya
da tribhuvana mahadēvipaṭana satyābharaṇanallūra grāma 1 kaṁ rēkhe ga 46 naḍuvikara paṭṭina suṁṇāūru kāluvaḷi saha grāma 1 rēkhe ga 50 Ubhayaṁ grāma 2 kaṁ
rēkhe ga 96 Akṣāradalu grāma yeraḍakkaṁ toṁbhattu Āṟu hoṁnigaṁ �yo grāmada catussīmege saluva naṁje punje vānpayiru punpayiru vāsiluvari vāluva
ri sekukaḍame taṟikaḍame Āsuvapudu makaḷakaḍime māvaḍe maravaḍe kuḷavaḍe sāraḍe duḷira vaṭa kaṭaḷevaṭa Ēri �vonabele saṁte Uṁṭāda hala Upādhigaḷū saha sērsi koṭṭevā
gi yā grāmadali Uḷa ścatussīmegaḷalli Uṁṭāda nidhi nikṣēpa jala pāṣāṇa Akṣīṇi Āgāmi siddha sādhyaveṁba Aṣṭabhōga tēja svāmyavanū Āgumāḍikoṁḍu dēva
ra nityaneyivēdyavanū tayimāsada rathōtsahavāda tirunāḷanū naḍasi sukhadalū Anubhavisūdu saṁka Eḍadoṟe Ubhayamārga horagāstānamānya
pūrvvamaryyāde Endu koṭṭa dharmmaśāsanapaṭe �yo Ubhayava naḍasuvadakke sutaṁtravāgi periyaOḍeyāru namaśśivāyadēvastānada kōyilu kēḷkumoda
naṁjaneladalū mara hoṟatāgi Ā vūra Aḷateyali suṁṇāūrali mā 2 satyābharaṇanalūra
naṁjenelanu mā 2 Ubhayaṁ nela yāgi Anubhavisikoṁḍu pūje namaskāravanū māḍikoṁḍu sukhadali yihudu . dānapālanayōrma
dhyē dānātchrēyōnupālanaṁ dānātsarggamavāpnōti pālanādaccutaṁ padaṁ . sa Ubaḷayittu Annamarsana baraha .
Digital edition of SII 9.463 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
